_doc: Maps each e2e/*.spec.ts file to the telemetry feature_use event names it exercises. Used by scripts/mine-telemetry-journeys.ts to detect which trackEvent() calls in the source aren't covered by any test. The weekly-test-coverage agent updates this file when it adds a new test. If a test exercises no trackEvent() calls (e.g. it's a navigation-only smoke), use [].
